title: Medical Evacuation : Bringing Your Loved Ones Home Safely
excerpt: Learn about medical evacuation services that safely transport patients internationally. Expert care from Dubai to anywhere in the world, 24/7 availability.
content:
Being hospitalized far from home is stressful for both patients and families. Medical Evacuation is the process of safely transporting patients back to their home country or preferred medical facility for continued treatment. At Air Medical 24x7, we specialize in making this journey as safe and comfortable as possible.

What is Medical Evacuation?

Medical Evacuation involves transporting patients who are injured or ill abroad back to their home country. This service is essential when:

  • Local medical facilities cannot provide adequate treatment

  • Patients prefer treatment in their home country

  • Insurance requires evacuation for coverage

  • Family support is needed for recovery

  • Language barriers complicate medical care

Types of Medical Evacuation Services

1. Air Ambulance Evacuation 

For critically ill patients requiring ICU-level care during transport. Features include:

  • Dedicated medical aircraft

  • Full life support systems

  • Continuous medical monitoring

  • Direct bed-to-bed service

2. Commercial Airline Stretcher Service

A cost-effective alternative for stable patients:

  • Business or first-class seats converted for stretcher use

  • Privacy curtains for dignity

  • Medical escort throughout the journey

  • Significant cost savings vs. private air ambulance

3. Flight Medical Escort

For patients who can sit but need medical supervision:

  • Experienced advanced paramedic

  • Assistance with medications and mobility

  • Coordination with airlines for medical clearance

  • Continuous care from departure to arrival

Why Families Choose Air Medical 24x7

Comprehensive Network

Our connections include:

  • 90+ embassies and consulates

  • 300+ international corporations

  • 2000+ hospitals worldwide

  • 5000+ medical facilities

This network ensures smooth coordination regardless of destination.

Experienced Case Management

Our operations team handles:

  • Medical clearances and documentation

  • Hospital admissions at destination

  • Ground ambulance coordination

  • Insurance paperwork assistance

  • Real-time family updates

Real Stories from Our Patients

"Thank you entire Team. Specially Ms Abeer. She was with us 24/7 with full support. Hospital discharge from UAE and till the admission in Hospital in India full care was provided." — Google Review

"I live in Canada and had to have my mother-in-law evacuated from Rwanda to Canada. Air Medical 24x7 handled the situation in a very professional way. They are available 24h for any question." — Google Review

The Evacuation Process

Step 1: Contact us via phone (+971 56 554 2001), WhatsApp, or email
Step 2: Medical evaluation and travel option discussion 
Step 3: Budget planning and documentation collection
Step 4: Advance payment to reserve transport
Step 5: Ground ambulance pickup and air transport
Step 6: Delivery to destination hospital

Insurance and Documentation

We provide:

  • Detailed invoices for insurance claims

  • Medical reports and clearance certificates

  • Coordination with insurance providers

  • Refund policies for unused deposits (minus arrangement fees)

Get Immediate Assistance

Medical evacuation can't wait. Our team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to assist with emergencies worldwide.
